name: Forum
author: Studio CMS
description: MyBB-inspired community forum for Struxa CMS. Categories → forums → threads → posts, with sticky/locked threads, post likes, thread subscriptions, user ranks, quote replies, Markdown rendering, online-now tracking, and a full admin moderation panel. Threads are also exposed as a 'Forum thread' CMS content type so they inherit SEO metadata, slugs and featured images.
